items.claim: Cody Garbrandt is currently content to not engage or throw strikes in his fights.
items.quote: It seems like Cody's kind of content to just like not really throw nowadays.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt has not been knocked out since his fight against Kai Kara-France five years ago.
items.quote: He hasn't been he hasn't been knocked out since Kai Car of France five years ago at flyweight.

items.claim: Adrian Yanez has not finished any high-level opponents recently, with his last finishes being against lower-tier competition.
items.quote: the last person he finished was the homeless man Venius Salvador and then he finished Tony Kelly and Randy Co. I mean, he hasn't actually finished anybody.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt has not fought anyone dangerous with their hands in a long time.
items.quote: Cody hasn't really fought anybody that's dangerous with their hands in a long time.

items.claim: Ricky Simone possesses an iron chin.
items.quote: the thing about Ricky Simone is that dude is an iron chin.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt lacks the length and speed to effectively land combinations on Adrian Yanez.
items.quote: He doesn't have the length or the speed.

items.claim: Luke Riley has shown defensive and durability vulnerabilities in his recent UFC performances.
items.quote: that guy's got terrible defense and a terrible chin.

items.claim: Kai Kamaka III is a legitimate veteran who possesses a well-rounded skill set.
items.quote: Kaiik Kamaka is a legit vet out of a real gym who can do a little bit of everything.
